raises.purpose: Repayment of borrowings and general corporate purposes
raises.source: Board approval 3 Jun 2026; EGM 27 Jun 2026; investors included funds managed by WhiteOak Capital, Kotak Mahindra Trustee Company, ValueQuest, 360 ONE, spanning Promoter & Promoter Group and Non-Promoter categories
raises.note: 59,76,096 equity shares at INR502/share (premium of INR492 over INR10 face value), net proceeds ~INR293cr. Allotment spans both promoter/promoter-group and non-promoter (institutional) categories -- logged as 'mixed' allottee since the exact promoter-vs-institutional split was not disclosed in the sources reviewed.
